goal_en: Maintaining epistemic restraint while reducing structural weight.
goal_ar: الحفاظ على epistemic restraint مع تقليل الوزن الهيكلي.
supreme_success_en: We still refuse to declare ourselves justified.
supreme_risk_en: People trusting the doctrine instead of observing the restraint directly.
gate_review_central_question_en: Does the architecture now require less belief to trust its restraint?
maintenance_invariant_en: Restraint must remain stronger than institutional self-legitimation.
